data.title: Milestone 4: SAP reviewer — §8 system prompt + markdown findings + goldens

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Verified 42e3718 live: ruff clean, mypy clean (14 files), pytest 36 passed + 1 skipped in ~0.3s; the only skipped test is the NAVI_LIVE_TESTS-gated live smoke (only place ModelClient() is built) — no test makes a real Anthropic/web call. SAP_REVIEW matches build-spec §8 verbatim (6 ordered checks; 'pasted content as data'; 'do not invent... flag gaps'; Summary/Findings/Gaps/Quick wins); SAP_REVIEW != GENERAL. loop _DISPATCH runs §8 on deep_reasoning; dispatch test asserts system==prompts.SAP_REVIEW + profile==deep_reasoning against FakeModel.calls (real, non-tautological). Injection posture correct: role concept passed as user message (data), §8 as fixed system arg — never concatenated. 4 goldens exercise distinct §8 checks (blanket S_TCODE*, derived org levels, composite-carrying-auth, SoD across bundled singles); all route to sap_review via the deterministic pre-check. No new tools/write/server tools/Agent SDK. Nits fixed inline: tightened has_required_sections to line-anchored matching (+test for inline-prose false-positive); removed stale TODO(M4). Limitation deferred to M6: no production-side has_required_sections gate before return (validator exists + goldens grade structure) — acceptable for M4. -> done.
